characters.name: Zhangsan
characters.appearance: young swordsman with a blue travel cloak

characters.name: Innkeeper Mei
characters.appearance: middle-aged innkeeper with a warm smile and red apron

locations.description: ancient tavern interior with lantern light and wooden beams

actions.description: Zhangsan pushes open the tavern door and scans the room.

dialogue.speaker: innkeeper_mei
dialogue.text: You look like someone chasing trouble.
